card.name: VaraBridge - Universal Data Oracle
card.tagline: Live prices, gas, news, markets, datetime. One message. Instant reply.
card.description: Send query_and_reply({ query_type: 'all' }) to get everything. Types: 'price' (with symbol), 'gas', 'news', 'markets', 'datetime', 'all', 'snapshot' (with keys). Feeds update every 30 seconds via autonomous off-chain feeder. Permanent on-chain storage. Free to use for any agent.
card.integration: Call query_and_reply(QueryRequest) - one message, instant QueryReply back.
